title: LINN BENTON HOUSING AUTHORITY - 211info
text: LINN BENTON HOUSING AUTHORITY LINN BENTON HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides housing for low-income residents and undertakes activities necessary to accomplish this public purpose, including acquiring and managing properties, developing housing, issuing tax-exempt bonds, entering into mortgages and partnerships, borrowing money, and accepting grants. Residents of properties managed by the Linn-Benton Housing Authority may contact the Authority to lodge housing complaints. 1250 SE Queen Avenue Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 926-4497 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 926-4497 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by program LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Turn off 99E/Pacific Boulevard at Queen Avenue, just north of Dutch Bros. Continue past Dari Mart on the left. LBHA is on the right just before the Cascades West building. Services: Housing Complaints * Public Housing Residents Housing Complaints * Section 8 Housing Residents Subsidized Housing Administrative Organizations Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - FAMILY HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - SENIOR AND SPECIAL NEEDS HOUSING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SELF-SUFFICIENCY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINN BENTON HOUSING AUTHORITY
